untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition for 'Adam & Eve Double Top' requires visual/structural pattern detection (two peaks with specific morphology, neckline identification, support zone mapping) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The signal requires: (1) detection of two distinct peaks characteristic of AEDT, (2) identification of neckline breakout, (3) underlying support zone location—all of which require candlestick pattern analysis or multi-bar structure comparison not available in the indicator set. Recommended: implement as a custom pattern detector or use close < pivot support with volume confirmation as a simplified approximation.
translation_notes: Approximated SHORT entry using price breaking below pivot support (s1) as a proxy for neckline breakout. Used 2% stop loss and 20-day hold based on 13% decline target. True pattern detection requires candlestick morphology analysis unavailable in this indicator set. The 'meager rise' and 'support zone halting decline' concepts cannot be quantified with given indicators.
